name: 4th-11th Parivartana Yoga Vehicle Ownership
description: Mutual exchange between the 4th house of conveyances and 11th house of gains strongly secures vehicle ownership potential.

source_text.quote: An exchange between Labh's and Bandhu's Lords will confer conveyances... A benefic, related to Bandhu Bhava (and to its Lord), will bring with him auspicious effects (regarding conveyances)

all_of: The Lord of the 4th house (Bandhu Bhava) is positioned in the 11th house (Labha Bhava)
The Lord of the 11th house is positioned in the 4th house

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of vehicle ownership potential. A mutual exchange (Parivartana Yoga) between the house of conveyances (4th) and the house of gains (11th) strongly secures the native's ability to acquire and possess vehicles.

metadata.notes: A Parivartana Yoga specifically linking gains to conveyances in the natal chart.

name: Benefic in 4th House Conveyance Promise
description: Benefic influence upon the 4th house or its lord promises happiness from conveyances and safe travels.

source_text.quote: Should a benefic be in Bandhu, drishti Bandhu, or in yuti with the Lord of Bandhu, or a Drishti on the Lord of Bandhu Bhava, then the native will be happy with conveyances and be free from accidents and dangers.

any_of: A benefic planet is positioned in the 4th house (Bandhu Bhava)
A benefic planet aspects the 4th house
A benefic planet is conjunct the Lord of the 4th house
A benefic planet aspects the Lord of the 4th house

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of transport prosperity and mobility support. Benefic influence upon the 4th house or its lord promises unbroken happiness derived from conveyances and safe travels free from danger.

metadata.notes: Foundational structural pattern confirming the natal promise of safe and happy vehicle ownership.

name: 4th Lord with Mercury in Benefic Navamsa Vehicle Pattern
description: 4th lord in own house conjunct Mercury in benefic Navamsa with benefic aspect guarantees vehicle acquisition.

source_text.quote: When the 4th bhava occupied by its lord in a benefic Navamsa in conjunction with Mercury is aspected by a benefic planet, the astrologer may predict the acquisition of vehicles and other such conveniences on the part of the person born

all_of: The 4th house is occupied by the Lord of the 4th house
The Lord of the 4th house occupies a benefic Navamsa
The Lord of the 4th house is conjunct Mercury
The 4th house receives an aspect from a benefic planet

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of luxury transport and conveniences. The empowerment of the 4th house by its own lord and Mercury (signifying commerce and movement) under benefic influence guarantees excellent vehicle ownership.

metadata.notes: A multi-condition structural yoga combining house ownership, Navamsa dignity, and benefic influence.

name: Moon Conjunct 4th Lord in Lagna Vehicle Pattern
description: Moon in Lagna conjunct 4th lord directly attaches the native to personal vehicle ownership.

source_text.quote: When the Moon is in the Lagna in conjunction with the lord of the 4th bhava, the person born, say the sages, will have a horse to convey him.

all_of: The Moon is positioned in the Ascendant (Lagna)
The Lord of the 4th house is positioned in the Ascendant (Lagna) in conjunction with the Moon

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of personal vehicle ownership. The connection between the Moon (mind/comforts) and the 4th lord (conveyances) manifesting in the 1st house (self) directly attaches the native to personal transportation assets.

metadata.notes: Classical pattern linking personal identity to vehicle ownership via Moon-4th lord conjunction in Lagna.

name: Venus Conjunct 4th Lord in Lagna Royal Vehicle Pattern
description: Venus with 4th lord in Lagna denotes grand, high-status transportation of the highest opulence.

source_text.quote: if the lord of the 4th bhava occupies the Lagna in conjunction with Venus, the person concerned will have an elephant to ride on.

all_of: The Lord of the 4th house is positioned in the Ascendant (Lagna)
Venus is positioned in the Ascendant (Lagna) in conjunction with the Lord of the 4th house

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of royal or highly prestigious conveyances. Venus is the ultimate Karaka for luxury; its conjunction with the 4th lord in the 1st house denotes grand, high-status transportation synonymous with royalty (an elephant).

metadata.notes: One of the most potent classical yogas for high-end vehicle ownership.

name: Jupiter Conjunct 4th Lord Enclosed Luxury Vehicle Pattern
description: Jupiter's association with the 4th lord provides safe, substantial, and comfortable enclosed vehicles.

source_text.quote: When the lord of the 4th bhava is associated with Jupiter, the person born will have a vehicle bordered on all the four sides.

all_of: The Lord of the 4th house is conjunct or strongly associated with Jupiter

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of expansive and protected transport. Jupiter's association with the 4th lord provides safe, substantial, and comfortable (bordered) enclosed vehicles, equating to large, luxurious modern cars.

metadata.notes: Indicates safety, status, and luxury combined in a single classical pattern.

name: 4th Lord Jupiter Venus in 9th Multiple Vehicles Yoga
description: Extraordinary combination of vehicle significators merging in the 9th house yields massive transport prosperity.

source_text.quote: If the lord of the 4th bhava in conjunction with Jupiter and Venus, occupy the 9th bhava and if the lord of the latter be in the 4th or in any of the other Kendras or in a Trikona position, the person born will possess many vehicles and lands.

all_of: The Lord of the 4th house is positioned in the 9th house
Jupiter is positioned in the 9th house
Venus is positioned in the 9th house
The Lord of the 4th house is conjunct Jupiter and Venus
any_of: The Lord of the 9th house is positioned in the 4th house
The Lord of the 9th house is positioned in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th)
The Lord of the 9th house is positioned in a Trikona (5th, 9th)

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of immense transport prosperity. A combination of the 4th lord, Jupiter, and Venus in the house of fortune (9th), fully supported by the 9th lord's strength, yields a fleet of vehicles and multiple properties.

metadata.notes: Defines peak vehicle accumulation potential. Rare combination yielding exceptional transport prosperity.

name: Vargottama Lagna and 9th Lord Royal Vehicle Yoga
description: Extremely high structural strength of Vargottama 1st and 9th lords in angles/trines indicates transport of the highest opulence.

source_text.quote: Should at birth the lord of the Langa being Vargottama be posited in a kendra or Trikona and the lord (of the 9th) being Vargottama be posited in a kendra or the 9th in his own sign or his sign of exaltation, the native will become a king who will occupy a beatiful golden vehicle on the back of an elephant, with chowries adorning the two sides.

all_of: The Lord of the Ascendant (Lagna) is in Vargottamamsa
The Lord of the 9th house is in Vargottamamsa
The Lord of the 9th house is in its own sign or sign of exaltation
any_of: The Lord of the Ascendant is positioned in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th)
The Lord of the Ascendant is positioned in a Trikona (5th, 9th)

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of supreme royal conveyance. Extremely high structural strength (Vargottama) of the 1st and 9th lords combined with angular/trinal placement indicates transport of the highest opulence and societal dominance.

metadata.notes: A definitive signature for royal or elite-level transportation. Rare but extremely powerful when present.
